title: The pillars
sub: Four abstract classes. A router, an event bus, a lifecycle. No decorators, no DI, no automated change detection. Everything lives in your src/core/ folder, not buried in node_modules.
component-desc: BaseComponent, Component, View — a clear hierarchy with explicit lifecycle hooks.
singleton-desc: One instance, shared across the whole app.
event-desc: Event-triggered rendering. State flows through explicit channels you define.
routing-desc: Hash or history routing, route guards — no magic involved.
testing-desc: Jest-inspired, works across frontend and backend.
